sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85399" key="polu/sxhmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-σχημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πολυσχήμων, χείρ</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.26</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πολυσήμῳ</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
